title: Magical Login/Register Skript
description: Welcome your players in style! This lightweight Skript shows a centered welcome message and guides new players to register and returning players to log in.
body:
**Give your players a first impression they’ll never forget! This elegantly designed Skript transforms the moment a player joins your server into a magical experience. With a stunning, centered welcome message, newcomers instantly feel at home, while returning players are smoothly guided to log in.**

**No more confusing logins or impersonal joins—every message, color, and animation is fully customizable to match your server’s unique style. Lightweight, powerful, and fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4, this Skript is perfect for servers of any size, from cozy communities to massive public realms.**

**Runs smoothly on Aternos! To use it there, simply install the Skript plugin, and you’re ready to go.**

**Elevate your server’s onboarding, captivate your players, and give every join a professional, polished touch. Make each player feel like a hero from the very first moment!**

**Join our community for support, updates, and exclusive tips: [https://discord.gg/Q89W2ebg](https://discord.gg/Q89W2ebg)**

**▶️ Watch tutorials and updates on YouTube: [https://youtube.com/@ninja_gamerz2692](https://youtube.com/@ninja_gamerz2692)**

1️⃣ Requirements:

Spigot server (1.21.4 recommended)

Skript plugin .jar file (download: Skript Releases)

Your .sk Skript file


2️⃣ Install Skript Plugin:

Put Skript.jar into your server’s plugins folder.

Start the server.

plugins/Skript folder will be created automatically.


3️⃣ Upload Your Skript:
Unarchive this zip

And..
Place your .sk file into plugins/Skript/scripts/.

**new plugin is here:**
https://modrinth.com/project/7y8POuIN
